free_text: Excitation functions of proton induced nuclear
reactions on natural nickel for monitoring beam
metallic foils of high purity nat-Ni thickness of 10,
degradation of proton energy was calculated according
to C. F. Williamson et.al., CEA-R3042(1966).
Copper foils were inserted into the stack for beam
monitoring. The flux and the mean beam energies were
determined by fitting to the well known excitation
The incident proton energy was defined by
operating condition of the cyclotron and measured by
analyzing magnet with an accuracy of 0.2 MeV.
The total estimated errors in cross sections
are (9-12%) obtained by summing quadratically the
BIB section updated. Data from D4002002 are
